query: Tesla Master Plan Part 3 summary key details 2026
a_issues: Content A is sparse on the actual key details. Its strongest snippets only say the plan has three components and is about end-use electrification; it lacks several anchor-supported specifics needed for a useful summary. One result is a noisy Tesla 'master-plans' page with mostly locale links and little relevant substance. The PDF snippet is an out-of-context extraction about green hydrogen and citations, which is not a coherent summary and could mislead by overemphasizing one detail.
b_issues: Content B still lacks some anchor-supported specifics such as concrete figures often associated with summaries (for example cost comparisons or storage/generation numbers), and it includes one low-value 'Master Plans' result that is not specific to Part 3. However, there are no clear internal contradictions, and the substantive snippets are aligned with the Tesla page and secondary coverage.
reasoning: B better enables a correct answer because it contains more of the core facts needed to summarize Tesla Master Plan Part 3: that it was published by Tesla as a 41-page roadmap, focuses on a sustainable global energy economy through end-use electrification plus sustainable electricity generation and storage, and covers forecasting demand, building a generation/storage portfolio, and assessing material/manufacturing needs. It also adds a concrete efficiency-related detail (27% end-use losses) and explains the fossil-fuel-elimination framing. A has the official Tesla result too, but overall it provides less usable substance and more irrelevant/noisy content, so an LLM would have a harder time producing a solid summary from A alone.
